creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Upstream development has ended 2 years ago and the MYSQL option is broken as 
USE_PHP=mysql is no longer supported with PHP 7.x, so there is some doubt as
to whether it even works with PHP 7 or not.

Should this port be removed?  If it stays the MYSQL should be fixed.

http://blog.pivotx.net/2017-03-22/pivotx-development-has-ended
